pageContext.name: Megumi Fushiguro
pageContext.description: Threezero's Jujutsu Kaisen figure series is under the FigZero product line, which is well-known for its highly poseable sixth scale figures, detailed head sculpts, and tailor-made outfits to capture the memorable appearance as seen in the original anime series.  The Megumi Fushiguro Sixth Scale Figure is approximately 11.6 inches (29.6cm) tall, and is a fully-articulated collectible figure with over 32 points of articulation. The head is sculpted by renowned sculptor Akinori Takaki, and the materials used for the figure are mainly PVC and ABS.   The character's costume includes the Jujutsu High uniform and a pair of black socks, which are both made of fabric. This Megumi Fushiguro figure comes with two interchangeable faceplates and six sets of interchangeable hands including his signature Shadows Technique gestures, fists, and hands for holding weapons. Additional accessories include one pair of wooden Tonfa, one Cursed Sword, one seal box, and one pair of brown ankle boots. The seal box can store Sukuna's Finger included with the Yuji Itadori Sixth Scale Figure from FigZero (sold separately).  Add to your anime figure collection today!
